title: Allosaurus Stalking Prey Coloring Page
seoTitle: Allosaurus Stalking Prey Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Clean line-art depiction of an Allosaurus predator navigating through prehistoric ferns. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: It grew up to 38 feet (12 meters) in length and walked on two strong hind legs, using its heavy tail for balance.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing smooth gradient shading using high-resolution colored pencils.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
